scripts.check:observable-training-worker: tsup tools/observable-training-sampling-worker.ts tools/observable-training-sampling-worker-check.ts --format esm --out-dir .artifacts/observable-training-worker-test --platform node --no-splitting --treeshake --silent --clean && node .artifacts/observable-training-worker-test/observable-training-sampling-worker-check.js && npm run check:observable-training-launcher
scripts.check:signal-classifier: tsup tools/validate-signal-lab-classifier.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/tools --platform node --silent && node dist/tools/validate-signal-lab-classifier.js
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:observable-training && npm run typecheck:observable-validation
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:observable-training-worker && npm test && npm run check:signal-classifier-model && npm run check:signal-classifier && npm run check:signal-classifier-publication
